name: @gamopls/backend
description: The single deployable backend for GAMOPLS TeamCore V1: one Fastify process mounting services/map, services/chat, services/board, services/hub, services/fleet, and services/registry as route modules under /map, /chat, /board, /hub, /fleet, /registry. Those services/* packages remain the owners of their routes, schemas, and tests (buildApp() + registerXRoutes()) — this package is only the composition root/process boundary. New product features should be added as CORE plugins (plugins/<name>, self-registering with /registry) rather than new route modules here — see docs/architecture and CLAUDE.md's Deployment topology (V1) section.

scripts.test: echo 'no tests for backend (composition-only, routes are tested in their owning service)' && exit 0
